title: gilia inconspicua subsp. interior
intro: Gilia inconspicua subsp. interior, also known as the interior gilia, is a plant species native to North America that belongs to the phlox family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The interior gilia has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections, and potentially reducing fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to utilize its medicinal properties.
